steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: This is a "according to the text" comprehension question. The passage opens with a direct statement of what the narrator and Mario did during the car ride; the correct choice must match that statement exactly.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'They read books.': The passage never mentions reading during the car ride. ✗
  • Choice B — 'They sang songs.': The passage never mentions singing during the car ride. ✗
  • Choice C — 'They went to sleep.': The passage never mentions sleeping during the car ride. ✗
  • Choice D — 'They played games.': The passage states directly that "Mario and I played games to see how many different license plates we could spot." ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
